daily_summary.headline: Quiet Day in Space: Routine Launches and Minor Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | GPS III SV10
top_events.description: Launch of the tenth GPS III satellite by SpaceX for the US Space Force.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch details.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Minor aurora activity expected at high latitudes with Kp index reaching 4.
top_events.action: Check conditions if at high latitudes.

top_events.title: HASTE | Bubbles
top_events.description: Sub-orbital launch under Rocket Lab’s HASTE program.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
